description: Manage multiple Python versions and switch between them easily.

root.name: help
tip: Show help for a specific command or list all commands.

root.name: local
tip: Set or show the local Python version for the current directory.
Creates a .python-version file in the current directory.

root.name: global
tip: Set or show the global Python version.
Affects all directories unless overridden by local version.

root.name: shell
tip: Set or show the shell-specific Python version.
Overrides global and local settings for the current shell session.

root.name: install
tip: Install a Python version from source.

option.name: -k
tip: Keep source tree in $PYENV_BUILD_ROOT after installation.

option.name: -v
tip: Verbose mode: print compilation status to stdout.

option.name: --list
tip: List all available versions for installation.

option.name: --list-all
tip: List all available versions including development versions.

root.name: rehash
tip: Rehash pyenv shims to recognize newly installed Python versions.
Run this after installing a new Python version.

root.name: version
tip: Displays the active Python version with its origin.

root.name: versions
tip: List all Python versions known to pyenv.

option.name: --bare
tip: Show only version names without additional information.

root.name: which
tip: Show the full path to the executable that would be invoked.

root.name: whence
tip: Show all Python versions with the given command.

option.name: --path
tip: Show full paths instead of version names.

root.name: exec
tip: Run a command with the selected Python version.

root.name: root
tip: Display the root directory where versions and shims are stored.

root.name: prefix
tip: Display the installation prefix for a Python version.

root.name: latest
tip: Show the latest installed or known version.

option.name: --known
tip: Show the latest known version instead of installed.

root.name: hooks
tip: List hook scripts for the given pyenv command.

option.name: --short
tip: List only shim names without full paths.

root.name: init
tip: Load pyenv into the current shell.

root.name: completions
tip: Generate shell completion scripts for pyenv.
